name: NeuralForecast (Nixtla Deep Learning for Time Series)

performance.notes: GPU-accelerated via PyTorch Lightning; inference fast after training

agent_readiness.notes: Deep learning time series library with 30+ neural architectures. from neuralforecast import NeuralForecast. from neuralforecast.models import NBEATS, NHITS, TFT, PatchTST, TimesNet. nf = NeuralForecast(models=[NBEATS(h=12, input_size=24), NHITS(h=12)], freq='M'). nf.fit(df). nf.predict(). Models: NBEATS, NHITS, N-HiTS, TFT, Informer, Autoformer, PatchTST, TimesNet, iTransformer, LSTM, TCN, BiTCN. Built on PyTorch Lightning. Long format: unique_id, ds, y. Probabilistic forecasting: prediction intervals. Cross-validation: nf.cross_validation(df, h=12, n_windows=3). GPU: automatically uses CUDA.

gotchas: Requires GPU for practical training on large datasets
30+ model choices require expertise to select appropriately
Long format data requirement (unique_id, ds, y columns)
Training time can be significant for transformer-based models
best_when: Complex temporal patterns requiring deep learning models
When NBEATS/NHITS/TFT significantly outperform statistical methods
Large multi-series datasets with GPU available
avoid_when: Short series with few observations (statistical models better)
summary: NeuralForecast provides 30+ neural architectures for time series: NBEATS, NHITS, TFT, PatchTST, TimesNet, iTransformer. NeuralForecast(models=[NBEATS(h=12)], freq='M').fit(df).predict(). Long format data. PyTorch Lightning backend with automatic GPU use. Probabilistic forecasting with prediction intervals. Apache-2.0. Part of Nixtla ecosystem. Best for complex temporal patterns where deep learning outperforms statistical methods.
